studies.title: Multicenter randomized controlled trial (RCT) to demonstrate the positive care effects of the medical device companion® shoulder in adult patients with conservatively managed shoulder lesions with subacromial pain

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product companion® shoulder, as evidenced by the repeated mention of the product name in the title and throughout the trial description. The intervention group in the study receives the DiGA companion® shoulder, confirming the focus on this specific product.

_classification.reason: Keyword match: 3 RCT indicators vs 1 RWE indicators.
